zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME於1115年8月20日出生在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e時，他的父親Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME16歲，母親Ponce de la Marche23歲。他於1151年與Countesse Marguerite de Turenne結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1179年8月14日在義大利西西利亞享年63歲，埋葬在法國努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特拉 庫洛阿巴易 諾特-達 德 拉 庫洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME于1115年8月20日出生在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特安古利e时，他的父亲Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME16岁，母亲Ponce de la Marche23岁。他于1151年与Countesse Marguerite de Turenne结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1179年8月14日在意大利西西利亞享年63岁，埋葬在法国努維勒-阿吉泰哈倫特拉 庫洛阿巴易 諾特-達 德 拉 庫洛。

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME was born on 20 August 1115, in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, his father, Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME, was 16 and his mother, Ponce de la Marche, was 23. He married Countesse Marguerite de Turenne in 1151. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 14 August 1179, in Sicily, Italy, at the age of 63, and was buried in Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME est né le 20 août 1115, à Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, son père, Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Ponce de la Marche, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Countesse Marguerite de Turenne en 1151. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 14 août 1179, à Sicile, Italie, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME am 20. August 1115 in Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME 16 und seine Mutter Ponce de la Marche 23. Er hat 1151 Countesse Marguerite de Turenne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 14. August 1179 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Sizilien, Italien und wurde in Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich begraben.

Lui sposato Countesse Marguerite de Turenne nel 1151. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEMEが1115年8月20日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントアンゴウルeメで生まれた時，父Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEMEは16歳，母Ponce de la Marcheは23歳であった。1151年にCountesse Marguerite de Turenneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1179年8月14日にイタリアシシリアで63歳で死去し，フランスノウベレ-アクイティアインチャーエントラ コウロンアッバイ ノトレ-ダム ド ラ コウロンにて埋葬された。

ko.Abbaye Nôtre-Dame de La Couronne, La Cou: 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 라 쿠론 애브베이 노트레-다 데 라 쿠론
ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME(이)가 1115년 8월 20일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 앤굴e에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Ponce de la Marche(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1151년 Countesse Marguerite de Turenne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1179년 8월 14일 이탈리아 시실리야에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 처트 라 쿠론 애브베이 노트레-다 데 라 쿠론에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME nasceu em 20 de agosto de 1115, em Angoulême, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Ponce de la Marche, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Countesse Marguerite de Turenne em 1151. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de agosto de 1179, em Sicilia, Itália, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume VI d'ANGOULEME родился 20 августа 1115 г. в местности ангоулeм, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция, его отцу по имени Wulgrin II d'ANGOULEME было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Ponce de la Marche, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Countesse Marguerite de Turenne в 1151 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он умер 14 августа 1179 г. в местности сисиля, Италия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности эббеи нотре-дэм де ла коуронн, ла коуронн, чарент, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция.

Se casó con Countesse Marguerite de Turenne en 1151. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de agosto de 1179, en Sicilia, Italia, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en Abbaye Notre-Dame de La Couronne, La Couronne, Charente, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia.
